title: Progress: Thermal Swooping Wing critical curation validation
body: Critical curation pass validated. Archived source windows for napkin, open questions, and the n2 pending-graduations shard; active surfaces now carry compact route/disposition maps. markdownlint and git diff --check passed. practice:fitness:informational and practice:fitness --strict-hard both exit 0 with SOFT only: 20 soft, 21 healthy, hard 0, critical 0. No comms files moved or deleted.
